note: Plain email -- floor:email on all three surfaces (EMAIL_RE is byte-identical).
Canonical ISO 13616 GB82 test IBAN -- mod-97 VALID, so floor:iban fires (no precision risk). A drift in _iban_ok / ibanOk on any surface drops this. Synthetic public test vector, not a real account.
Same canonical GB82 IBAN with internal spaces, matching common PDF/OCR grouping. All surfaces must still emit one iban span over the spaced form.
text: Solde sur IBAN GB82 WEST 1234 5698 7654 32 confirme.

note: Same canonical GB82 IBAN in lowercase. All surfaces must match case-insensitively and validate after uppercasing.
Same canonical GB82 IBAN with hyphen separators. All surfaces must strip hyphens for mod-97 validation while preserving original offsets.
Luhn-VALID 16-digit Visa test number -- floor:card. A drift in _luhn_ok / luhnOk or the 15/16-digit gate drops this. Public Luhn test vector, not a real card.
Same Luhn-valid card with U+2013 en-dash separators, as seen in PDF extraction. Normalization is length-preserving; all surfaces must emit payment_card at original offsets.

Luhn-VALID 9-digit value (public SIN test vector 046454286) with a preceding NAS cue and OQLF 3-3-3 spacing. Must emit government_id on all three. The cue forces emission even past BN suppression (never-leak SIN-cue override). value is the digit-normalized form so the assert is separator-agnostic.
Same Luhn-valid SIN with NBSP group separators, the historical PDF/CSV extraction miss. All surfaces must normalize spaces length-preservingly and emit government_id.

SAME Luhn-VALID 9-digit value, but immediately followed by an RT0001 program account and with NO SIN cue -> it is a Canadian Business Number (GST/QST registration printed on invoices), NOT a SIN. Must be SUPPRESSED on all three (no government_id span). suppress lists the label that must be ABSENT.
text: Fournisseur TPS 046454286 RT0001 sur la facture.

note: 8-4-4-4-12 hex UUID -- floor:uuid, emitted as sensitive_account_id on all three (UUID_RE is byte-identical). Synthetic id, never occurs by accident in prose.
RFC5322 display-name mailbox: a strong email anchor makes the adjacent personal name deterministic enough for the shared floor. Synthetic name/email.
Role/distribution mailbox display names must not become person spans even though the email anchor is present.
HARDENING (2026-06-20 sweep): a Luhn card broken by zero-width (Cf) chars must still redact on every surface -- the Cf-strip + re-scan was mirrored to appliance/gate/TS. Synthetic Luhn test card.
HARDENING: dot-grouped 4-4-4-4 Luhn card (separatedCardSpans) -- all three surfaces redact; a non-Luhn dotted run is rejected (covered by the appliance unit tests).
HARDENING: TAB (control / Cc whitespace) separated Luhn card -- the control-whitespace separator class must redact identically everywhere.
HARDENING: a mod-97-valid IBAN broken by zero-width (Cf) chars must still emit one iban span on every surface.
HARDENING: a Luhn-valid SIN glued to a letter run (no separators) -- the glued-digit-run rule promotes it to government_id on all three surfaces. Synthetic Luhn SIN.
HARDENING: TAB-separated SIN under a NAS cue -- control-whitespace must not defeat the cued government_id floor.
HARDENING: card_cvv now has a cue-anchored Tier-0 floor on every surface (a stray 3-digit number stays clean -- covered by the appliance unit tests).
text: Code cvv 123 au verso de la carte.

note: HARDENING: card_expiry has a cue-anchored Tier-0 floor on every surface (a bare MM/YY date without a cue stays clean).
